title: hydrocotyle trachycarpa
intro: Hydrocotyle trachycarpa, also known as Indian pennywort or Gotu kola, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Australia and Asia, belonging to the family Araliaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle trachycarpa include improving cognitive function, boosting the immune system, and reducing stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
